_comment: HMM parameters. 3 states: STANDARD, VOWEL_CLUSTER, GAP_CONSONANT. Context-conditioned emissions use next-glyph lookahead for 'o'. Separate A/B params will override specific values.

transitions._comment: P(next_state | current_state, glyph). Only non-trivial transitions listed.

GAP_CONSONANT._note: GAP exits quickly, it's a single-glyph hypothesis

emissions._comment: P(phoneme | glyph, state). Only state-specific overrides listed; STANDARD uses glyphs.json defaults.

GAP_CONSONANT._comment: Low-probability emissions for missing Latin consonants b/g/v/x. These are hypothetical and should only win if resulting Latin word is in Perseus.

context_emissions._comment: Context-conditioned emissions for 'o' based on next glyph. Applied BEFORE state transitions.
